creator: greg@greg.rim.or.jp
text:
wget can not rewrite a relative link collectly. For example.
Base URI is "http://www.foo.com/~bar" and link is "../%7Ebar/some/sone.html".
wget must rewrite a link like this, "../%257Ebar/some/sone.html" or
"some/sone.html". But wget not.

Fix: I create a fix and reported into wget maintener.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Do mirror that have relative links include "../%7E"
